case_title: 449 O'FARRELL STREET LLC VS. ONIKA CHAMBERS ET AL

DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 449 O'FARRELL STREET LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, ONIKA AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 449 O'FARRELL STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, ONIKA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 449 O'FARRELL STREET LLC SERVED MAY-22-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, ONIKA AN INDIVIDUAL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, ONIKA AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 449 O'FARRELL STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAMBERS, ONIKA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 449 O'FARRELL STREET, #406, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
